diagrams.title: Universal vs Existential Quantifier Visualization
diagrams.description: Shows a domain of elements (circles) with universal quantifier covering ALL elements and existential quantifier pointing to ONE element
elements: Universal quantifier symbol (∀) with arrows to ALL elements
Existential quantifier symbol (∃) with arrow to ONE element
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the fundamental difference between 'for all' and 'there exists'

diagrams.title: Negation of Quantifiers (De Morgan's Laws)
diagrams.description: Demonstrates how negation transforms universal to existential and vice versa with truth tables
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how negation interacts with quantifiers and how to properly negate quantified statements

diagrams.title: Nested Quantifiers: Order Matters
diagrams.description: Shows the difference between ∀x∃y and ∃y∀x using a mapping diagram between two sets
elements: Arrows showing ∀x∃y: each x has its own y
Arrows showing ∃y∀x: one y connected to ALL x
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how the order of different quantifiers affects meaning and truth values

diagrams.title: Bound vs Free Variables
diagrams.description: Shows formulas with variables marked as bound (within quantifier scope) or free (outside scope)
diagrams.purpose: Distinguishing between variables that are controlled by quantifiers and those that are not
